# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

---
# Snapshot Repository Configuration
"elasticsearch_snapshot_repository": {
  "s3_repository": {
    "type": "s3",
    "settings": {
      "bucket": "bucket-name",
      "region": "us-west-1",
      "access_key": "your-access-key-id",
      "secret_key": "your-secret-access-key"
    }
  },
  "file_repository": {
    "type": "fs",
    "settings": {
      "location": "/path/to/your/location"
    }
  }
}

# Snapshot Creation Configuration
"elasticsearch_create_snapshot": {
  "snapshot_name": "snapshot-1",
  "indices": ["index-1", "index-2"],
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": false,
  "metadata": {
    "taken_by": "myuser",
    "taken_because": "backup before upgrading"
  }
}

# Snapshot Restoration Configuration
"elasticsearch_restore_snapshot": {
  "repository": "source_repository",
  "snapshot": "snapshot-1",
  "indices": ["index-1", "index-2"],
  "rename_pattern": "index-(.+)",
  "rename_replacement": "restored_index-$1",
  "include_global_state": false
}
